personalBio.name: Sidheshwar
personalBio.title: Software Engineer
personalBio.subtitle: Focused on Full-Stack Systems, APIs, and Product Code
personalBio.about: I am an entry-level software engineer from IIT Roorkee with strong foundations in DSA and hands-on experience across Spring Boot, Python, MERN, REST APIs, Docker, and Kubernetes. I build full-stack products, backend workflows, and practical systems that connect clean interfaces with reliable application logic.
